channel.title: /biz/ Active (filtered, with replies)
channel.description: Filtered out: general, gme, bbbyq. OP + first 3 replies + last 30 replies.

item.title: any WFH chads can you tell me how you found your job I have hospitality, customer service and even low level management… — 23 replies — 92.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
any WFH chads can you tell me how you found your job I have hospitality, customer service and even low level management…

Open thread • Replies: 23 • Updated: 2026-04-07 20:57 UTC

OP

any WFH chads can you tell me how you found your job
I have hospitality, customer service and even low level management experience but im not getting any offers on my applications
Should I get some cyber security certs? which ones should I focus on if yes?

Early replies (first 3)

62084718
Funny of you to ask OP, I remember my struggles of landing my first WFH job. Btw, WFH stands for Work from Home because not many people come across that term usually. But, if you must ask, our company is headquartered in Nashville. My base pay is 95k per year along with a COL stipend and generous health and pension benefits. As we speak, I am clocked into my position in the beautiful hot springs in British Columbia. We do have an RTO policy, but I haven't been to the office in 4 years! Ha-Ha! You COULDN'T pay me to work in the office. Yesterday I had fun fucking a uni student that transferred from china for the school years, so yeah life is great so far. Today she is making me her traditional Chinese dinner as a thank you for fucking her so nicely. Maybe next month I'll fly out to Holland and do my job for the month. But like I said OP, keep your chin up and don't be disuaded by the multiple rejection emails in your future until you get that golden offer. Take it and run with it. Anyways .... Chiao!

62084729
>>62084718
thanks for the response anon
Did you use indeed or pay for a website that specializes in WFH jobs like flexjobs etc? I'm wondering if indeed is just all scams at this point and if it might be worth it to pay a job finding website to filter the garbage

62084746
There are no jobs anymore. 200,000 people have been laid off in the last six months while job creation is negative. 90% of job openings go to immigrants anyway.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62084747
>>62084729
Mainly family connections.

62084759
>>62084746
>no more jobs
They hire new people every day faggot. Go post your demoralization shit somewhere else

62084791
>>62084746
yeah, I guess i'll just keep shitposting about the epstein files on /x/ until something works out

62084803
>>62084678
WFH is common in the technical writing field

62084965
>>62084718
Holy comfy
GIWTWM

62085002
>>62084678
so many green id’s in this thread
good sign op

62085269
>>62084791
best to give up and just hate on glowies by posting things they hate like Epstein
your inability to find a job is a sign to make their lives miserable or else they would make sure you found work

62085740
Demoralizers are right. Your best bet is to make a YouTube channel going over the Epstein files. That shit is huge now. Everyone here should be doing 4chan schizo shit on social media because everything we’ve been talking about, banker greed, Epstein abuse, conspiracy, ww3 apocalypse is now becoming mainstream. Most of you saw this coming. Time to capitalize on it

62085750
>>62085740
>Demoralizers are right about there being no more normie jobs

62085875
>>62084678
>Should I get some cyber security certs? which ones should I focus on if yes?
No, because literally every retard like you has decided that cybersecurity is a comfy do-nothing job and EVERYONE has flooded the industry. There were not enough cyber security jobs 10 years ago, there sure aren't enough today now that it has been meme'd as retard daycare.

62085899
>>62084678
Honestly data analytics is an easy WFH career path. Just learn SQL and either PBI, Tableau, or Qlik depending on what company you want to work for. Maybe some python would be good too, but I got a job a few years ago basically only knowing SQL and making a follow along tutorial Tableau dashboard.

62085904
>>62085875
Exactly this. OP should focus their attention on destroying glowfucks and not something that only neckbeard redditors want to do. Cybersecurity was always fake and for fags

62086811
>>62084759
>They hire new people every day faggot
yeah in hyderabad

62086826
>>62084746
Why you call them “immigrants” man? Those are not immigrants, those are pure turdies in turdworld
It’s called off sourcing

62087064
>>62084678
green id get

62087137
>>62084678
got it years ago

62087226
>>62085899
Thank you anon. Sounds like a plan, I am currently learning Python, is SQL hard to learn?
So basically I should look for jobs as Data Analyst, can I try to apply even without any experience in the field? I have been working as a development engineer since 7 years and looking to change careers into 100% WFH.

62087308
>>62087226
SQL is definitely easier than python. If you’re not a complete retard it shouldn’t take too long to become proficient. And yeah you can apply without any experience, data analyst is usually an entry level role. Just find some datasets online and make some dashboards that look nice and say you know SQL, that was enough for me to get a job. It’s not a bad career path because you can transition into data engineering pretty easily from data analyst and data engineers can make a lot of money at the right companies.

62087410
>>62084678
Why are you people still keeping the belief that wfh jobs are attainable alive? Its a complete scam, especially now.

>>62085904
>>62085875
This is right
>t. Fell for the cyber security meme because I thought I would be able to wfh

3 years later and I never got a job in the field let alone a wfh one. I fell for the scam. Don't do what I did.

62088425
>>62085875
I lucked into one of those roles and it sucked (apart from having ok pay and being WFH)
I'm sure people can succeed in that role but it's one of those roles where there's an autistic degree of variance in terms of responsibility and buy-in from the rest of the org, to most orgs it's just a cost center that gets in the way of productivity

item.title: >I would be a millionaire right now had I not sold my BTC 10 years ago How do I stop the suicidal thoughts whenever I am… — 43 replies — 59.8/hr
item.content:encoded:
>I would be a millionaire right now had I not sold my BTC 10 years ago How do I stop the suicidal thoughts whenever I am…

Open thread • Replies: 43 • Updated: 2026-04-07 20:26 UTC

OP

>I would be a millionaire right now had I not sold my BTC 10 years ago
How do I stop the suicidal thoughts whenever I am in the middle of the wagecage?

Early replies (first 3)

62084173
just think about how SBF's doing right now

62084179
>>62084173
Probably getting gaped, if he's lucky he got his adderall prescription behind bars and therefore maybe he's enjoying it

62084180
>>62084173
He got bailed out of jail thanks to the jews overlords, and has tons of millions of stolen dollars free to use whenever he wants.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62085229
>>62084159
well, you buy chainlink, watch your networth shrink to nothing very slowly and find a very tall place....

62085245
>>62084159
If you didnt sell 10 years ago you would have sold 8 years ago or 5 years ago. Then you still would have paid maybe close to half in taxes. So you would still most likely be right where you are today even if you didnt sell 10 years ago, this is the reality of investing. Just make as much money as you can and dont dwell on that bullshit

62085284
>>62085245
>Then you still would have paid maybe close to half in taxes
capital gains tax is around 20% in most countries

62085302
>>62084159
Very few people held past 10x, never mind 100x or 1000x. Smart people offload portions instead of selling it all and always keep a moonshot. You are just not smart and you probably would have blown that wealth on dumb shit like a sports car and an overpriced house in a suburb.
Your BTC is in better hands now.
>>62084300
Kek what is the bull case for BYND?

62085854
>>62084159
You stop them by realizing you sold when it made sense
Stop overanalyzing your decision process in a vacuum. Being paralyzed by hindsight will only garner more myopia to miss whatever the next opportunity that comes around your circles of interest
>t. former 100+ btc holder that is now broke af as well

62085868
>>62084159
I had an old work friend that is in the same situation as you. You might even be him. As I recall his new wife made him sell his BTC to pay for some stupid bullshit like a down payment on a car or whatever the fuck. He basically went insane and became super liberal and started worrying about trans rights and absolutely obsessing over Trump. His new hobby of being crazy helps him to pretend that money is not important as long as there are children out there that haven't been brainwashed, mutilated and sterilized by their insane mothers. Anyway.. his real problem isn't the missed opportunity for money. It's that he's married to a psychopath that manipulates him. They don't even have kids so his biological imperative was betrayed as well as his finances. Women are fucking evil.

62085887
>>62084159
me but 12 years ago
no point crying over spilled milk OP

62086589
>>62085284
Fuck man, my coworkers are giving me looks from laughing so hard

62086607
>>62085284
>dat bread cat on the bottom right

62086794
>>62084159
Well here is mine, and I guess mine is way more suicidy than yours
You judge:
>sold 69 eth on august 2019
>sold 10 million doge on September 2019
But I am still alive
Well, desu, part of the reason that I don’t care much, is that I am an incel, with so much insecurity that I don’t think any amount of money can save me
So, It didn’t really bother me

62086845
This is stupid logic. You would've told at 100,1000,10000. I remember buying ounces of weed for 32 btc while in school multiple times but I didn't believe in it then and I don't now

62086872
>>62086794
just speak to women.. No need to be an idiot wallowing in self pity

62086910
>>62086872
You don’t know me pal.
I speak to women, I go outside to clubs by myself, I dance, nothing matters.
Yet everyday I see women randomly start dancing with other guys while rejecting me 1 minute ago. Problem is that it’s not like they are chads either, it’s just something off with me and I can’t fix it.

62086927
>>62084159
If you weren't part of the top 10% in 2025, you're lower class

62086961
>>62086910
your thinking is what's off with you. You're probably a jew shill anyway, retard

62086971
>>62086910
Hello twin

62086983
>>62086961
Man I don’t know why you calling me a Jew, shill.
Like what am I even shilling?
Op is sad about him selling crypto early, and I told him my story, and the reason that I didn’t kill myself because of that massive loss of potential
>>62086971
You too bro? Sorry to hear that

62086988
>>62086845
>I didn't believe in it then and I don't now
Based retard incapable of learning from his mistakes

62086995
>>62086983
You're shilling some blackpill incel shit. It's not even real, you're just too retarded meet a woman because you have zero introspection

62087003
>>62086988
my goal in life isn't to make a buck (not like it can even x2 from here) and btc isn't going to become the world reserve currency

62087015
>>62086995
I am shilling it? Ok go fucking out then. I seen tons of non chad people get girls randomly grind on them, or give them lap dances.
Go fucking do it man.
I am saying the reason I don’t care about money, IN MY CASE, is that nothing works. I have insecurities and complexes stemming from years and years of neglect
You can call me even insane for still trying, but it doesn’t mean you won’t be successful if you do

62087021
>>62087003
>my goal in life isn't to make a buck
Breh, you're spending your free time on a business and finance board. You clearly care about money, lmao

62087047
>>62087021
First time I've been here in a while and I'm in the bath. All the other boards are flooded with shit to make real anons not come here

62087068
>>62087015
I know its demoralizing anon
But good on you for still trying
Have you tried options outside of going to clubs?
I've had moderate success with apps (don't aim for anything genuine), as long as you can get over the 'I don't think this is gonna work out' convo, and just keep trying, you'll eventually find somebody that can mesh with your life instead of trying to corral it.
The point is, keep trying. You got this anon

62087109
>>62087021
>you clearly care about paying for a roof over your head and food, lmao

kys

62087188
>>62084159
>Heard about Bitcoin when it was single digit dollars
>Wife says we should get some "just in case"
>Don't be stupid you dumb ho it's already pumped
>Still with her
My life is Hell she reminds me constantly I wish I was you

62087378
>>62087068
If I had even a moderate level of success on apps (which is purely looks) I wouldn’t have had any issue in clubs man.
And yeah, I tried nerd hobbies, sports, concerts etc
Zero results.
And it’s not like I am clueless. I can understand bodylanguage reactions, facial reactions. Every time I am talking to a girl, it’s like pulling tooth. No one engages, no back and forth. No banter.
Then I see some other dude come in and boom! Attraction in the air!, despite absolute dogshit conversation skills.
I mean I don’t even like concerts much (certainly not care about paying to see them play live, I rather just listen on my way to work etc) but I go to them alone.’you know how fucking messed up I have to be in a head to go somewhere that I don’t really enjoy and care about, KNOWING no one gonna like me anyway? Pure insanity
I mean I am happy that I am doing shit, that I didnt do before, cause I had no one to do it with me.
I am happy that I got the balls to go through this experiance by myself but man it sucks.
It really hurts
And worst? Is the gaslighting of me not doing enough or I need to “get a six pack”
Lmao I never seen one guy with a 6 pack and they all have girls.
lmao I remember this YouTuber telling guys to shower and his example was “listening to women asking this” and his example? A woman on TikTok talking about how she discovered that her date never washes his ass because of the dirty underwear’s and allegedly none of his friends do it either.
So, basically a woman met a literal unwashed ass dude, banged him, and then realized he never showers
Yeah, that help my self steem for sure, to feel like I am less than a literal shit covered dude
I am still gonna try though lol
Oh and about “there is no chemistry etc” talk, I been so cordial that it took the girls I talked to back because of the whole “guy go apeshit if he heads no” which is an absolute load of bullshit

62087406
>>62084159
Jesus. I was stupid enough to never buy BTC in the first place, but if I had like 10 BTC I would definitely have sold it for $30,000 or whatever the price was at that time
>BUT I BOUGHT IT FOR 10 BUX AND SOLD IT FOR 30K, THAT'S A GOOD PROFITS, RIGHT??? I DID GOOD HAHA NOW I CAN BUY A NEW COMPUTERS

People (especially me) are literal fucking retards, somehow it takes 30 years to figure out you need continuous cashflow, no debt, AND never, ever sell your investments

62087417
>>62086995
>You're shilling some blackpill incel shit. It's not even real, you're just too retarded meet a woman because you have zero introspection
You literally could not be more wrong. I dunno how normies like you even end up on this website. Try watching a video or something, or reading an article. 1 date for 1800 swipes. ~50% of men are virgins now and women demand $500k/year, this is very common knowledge.
Don't post anymore.

62088308
>>62087378
You're too stuck in your own head, anon
This neuroticism is working against your goals here. Do you see what the common theme is for all these other guys out there that you are demoralizing yourself against?
They don't give a fuck. That's the attitude most girls are drawn towards. Once they're invested, and there is something to lose from their side, then you can put in the effort. I have also had my best luck when I adopt a similar mindset
>I'm going to put myself out there, but desu I think I'd rather be at home playing sekiro
Go into conversations pretending (and eventually it won't be pretending) that you want *nothing* from these prospective mates. If you have something in common, invite them to do it together sometime. They will most certainly decline at first, and that's where you tell them
>that's OK, I'll be on my way then
And you part ways. Don't get hung up on what could have been and you won't be upset.
Most people are stuck in their own damaging neuroticism, anon. Don't take it personally, and don't force a conversation like you're just spamming A to get through the text boxes and it'll happen eventually. You need to relax and just stop caring about them. Its paradoxical, and that's part of the initial shit test if you want to enter the mating arena.
I just now found somebody that I can hang out with regularly like a month ago, but it took over a year of nothingness and rejection to get there when I started

item.title: the last 2 bottoms occured at black swan events: covid crash and FTX collapse. — 20 replies — 28.5/hr
item.content:encoded:
the last 2 bottoms occured at black swan events: covid crash and FTX collapse.

Open thread • Replies: 20 • Updated: 2026-04-07 20:27 UTC

OP

the last 2 bottoms occured at black swan events: covid crash and FTX collapse. What will be the black swan event that will mark this cycle's bottom?

Early replies (first 3)

62081158
>>62080987
I want to cum on that guy's tits

62081159
>>62081158
nvm it's a girl....... blegh.

62081212
>>62081159
/biz/ immediately recognizing a deprecating asset

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62081808
>>62080987
>black swan event
oil shock & Japan liquidating US treasuries isn't a black swan event but that's what will crash the system

62081826
>>62080987
I would fill my order in her bottom if you catch my drift

62081870
>>62080987
me in the back

62081899
>>62080987
My wife is wearing that color shirt and those pants right now hurrrrrgh.

62082384
>>62080987
I think either Japan fucking implodes, the AI bubble destroys american markets, WW3, Civil war on America or Binance falls.

62083800
>>62080987
this is the "good" version and the "evil" version is chloe moretz and the mexican valet

62083834
>>62080987
Literally thought that was a twink trans man in drag. Skinny white dude with a blonde wig and rubber tits. Look at the masculine facial structure. Elongated forearms, adams apple, broad shoulders. There is an 87% probable chance that is a MAN.

62083840
>>62080987
>What will be the black swan event that will mark this cycle's bottom?
Artemis shooting past the moon and getting lost in space

62083866
Are you people still talking about fucking crypto? That shit's old hat, all the dumb money moved to ai shit long ago. And even that is over.

62083918
I really like those boobs, perfect size, It makes me sad to see them because I know I Will never taste them again. I tasted them a couple of times but I gained 85 lbs during the lockdowns and Lost all my hair, so now women find me repulsive. It is what It is...

62083953
>>62080987
I won't apologize for that I need to do

62084001
>>62081159
Taylor swift is actually a man.

62084054
>>62080987
AI crashing with no survivors

62084542
>>62081212
kek

62087189
Im doing a dirty rp with grok about Tay tay right now

62088309
>>62080987
>What will be the black swan event
AI triggering kalshi market collapse

>that will mark this cycle's bottom?
Q4 2029

62088311
>>62080987
did you notice what happened on 10/10 ?

item.title: ITT say a coin and let KEK make a prediction. — 13 replies — 25.4/hr
item.content:encoded:
ITT say a coin and let KEK make a prediction.

Open thread • Replies: 13 • Updated: 2026-04-07 20:38 UTC

OP

ITT say a coin and let KEK make a prediction.

>Green ID - Coin will pump soon
>Red ID - Coin dumps
>Dubs silvered bullrun
>Trips or above golden bullrun for your coin

Note: If anon's follow these signals we will help KEK and create a self fulfilling prophecy

Ill start: BITCOIN

ALL YOU NEED IS BELIEF WAGMI

Early replies (first 3)

62083613
Cry Laughing Token (LMAO)

62083635
>>62083613
>>62083490
JUST WENT ALL IN WAGMI

62083641
>>62083490
APU

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62083652
>>62083641
Oh no

62083655
Jasmy

62083676
>>62083655
dubs.. not bad.. yellow id.. hmm
>>62083641
damn bro.. thanks a lot

and for mine i'll say HBAR

62083703
>>62083490
I believe in the funny yellow dog
Give it to me straight, kek: how will doge fare?

62083709
>>62083676
That’s gold anon not yellow

62083891
Fat Chud

62083975
PBR

62084598
PAAL

62088344
>>62083975
Sad

62088348
>>62083613
>>62083635
Just bought
>>62083641
>>62083703
>>62083975
It's over

item.title: Polkadot - First halving — 267 replies — 149.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
Polkadot - First halving

Open thread • Replies: 267 • Updated: 2026-04-07 19:21 UTC

OP

https://polkadothalving.com/ 10 more days. https://www.parity.io/blog/refining-polkadots-economic-architecture-issuance-DOT-DAP-and-network-adjustments
https://x.com/Polkadot/status/2028482336463945765
"
Polkadot’s economic upgrade begins rolling out in 10 days.

Enhanced tokenomics increases DOT scarcity and introduces new governance and staking mechanisms.

▸ DOT supply capped at 2.1B
▸ Emissions cut 53.6%
▸ Unbonding from 28 days to 24-48 hours
"

Early replies (first 3)

61933757
Guys?

61933779
>>61932834
10000$ @ 6.5
i dont sell my dotty

61936705
Guys?

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62072073
>>62071796
You're welcome.

Don't I get a little something

62073144
>>62072073
But of course Panjali, your are a citizen of Mumbai city, the city of DOT. Every citizen gets paid. We all get feed and loved by our kind lord Gavin Wood. He is the underworld CP kingpin. He sells Cheese Pizza and then redistributes the funds among DOT holders. Everyone in Mumbai is eating and licking Cheese Pizza. I also like to put some cream onto my Cheese Pizza and then lick it off.

Best regard from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar

62075463
100$ end of bull run

Best regard from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar

62077075
Every day after the 30th day I get 150 DOT as a bonus. If we keep the thread alive for 30 more days I'll get 30 * 150 = 4500 more DOT. Please help contribute so my village of Mumbai gets feed.

62078039
>>62077075
You are not in India

62078216
>>62078039
This is my hand >>62008295 young Vishnu. This was taken directly from Mumbai, the city of DOT.

Best regard from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar

62078593
Dont selling my dotty anymore

62078595
75

62078631
Depressing thread

62078789
>>62078216
Fake

62079572
>>62078631
Well, I've already got my 11.5k DOT that Gaving promised me and every day this thread stay alive I get an additional 150DOT. Doesn't really seem depressing to me

>>62078593
>>62078595
100$ END OF BULL RUN

>>62078789
I am brown as chocolate itself. I am a true Mumbai warrior

Thank you for keeping the thread alive my Mumbai warriors. You are feeding your village. This is a cooperative effort. The mumbai boys strike AGAIN


Best regard from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar

62079598
This is the most damaging thread for dot in history

62079614
>>62079598
Read this >>62069282. We're playing this whole board. They're eating right out of our hands. First we make them believe that DOT is held by the GLAMOROUS citizens of Mumbai. Then at the same time we pocket the money from Gavin Wood for keeping the thread alive. AND at the same time we SHORT IT TO 0$. The whole city of Mumbai is in on it. INDIA SUPER POWER BY 2020 wasn't a lie. It's a FACT for 6 years already.

Best regard from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar

62079649
>>62079614
But is the tech good?

62079750
>>62079649
Literally THE BEST chain currently. And no, I'm not just making shit up. It literally does what everyone else is trying to do. Once JAM + NOMT hit it'll be able to do MILLIONS of TPS (not just value tx) while doing continous compute, while being 100% decentalized, while the tx will be CHEAP, while having NATIVE interoperability, while being able to control other chains and never leave DOT, ... This projects is THE project and people are still buying meme coins. It's UNFATHOMABLE.

62080914
I hope you guys smell the bottom. I can smell the bottom of the Vishnu mindchain. I hope you're going in HARD and DEEP. I hope you guys are PENETRATING THE BOTTOM of the market. I hope you're bouncing up and down on that bottom. I hope you're eating that bottom out and scooping it up. Mmmm, that delicious Vishnu bottom. It has a great taste inside my mouth. I hope you guys are enjoying it as much as I am. I'll leave some cream for you so it tastes even better.

62080937
>>62079649
DOT is literally the most superior blockchain out there. Everything that other people promise and don't deliver DOT already has. Everything that other people lie about and can't do DOT can do. The really BIG upgrade we're waiting on is JAM and NOMT this year
Read more here >>62026407 and >>62056612 and >>62056570. NOMT + JAM scale the network to more a few million or maybe 10-20m TPS. We currently have the highest recorded TPS on a live network (https://data.parity.io/spammening). 143.3k TPS on a live network (NOT TEST NET BULLSHITERY like the other chains are showcasing). This was done one 23 of the 100 cores that are available. So this was only 23% of the full capacity. Some cores are already sold to other chains therefore we can't do a full test. But you can guesstimate the numbers, right? And since the last spammening the throughput has gone up. We could now probably do like 250k TPS from 23 cores or something like that. Just look at the "Performance Charts" on the page I linked. The fees were literally almost always below 0.05$. The fees were around 0.03 to 0.015$ even when the network handled 140k TPS. Do you remember how Solana halted the network literally 8x due to it being congested and shit like that? That can't happen on DOT. The average finality was 16.58s. The thing is though, we'll soon be getting 500ms blocks. When the tests were conducted the block times were still 12s? Now they're 6s and soon they'll be 500ms (Basti blocks). A lot is happening on DOT this year!
Also if you look at the stats the network has been growing over time https://data.parity.io/parachain-stats?selection-mode=include&frequency=daily

62080949
>>62079649
Also combine that with the new tokenomics and the long term vision for the project... I really don't see this project becoming irrelevant to be honest. It simply JUST FUCKING DOES WHAT IT'S SUPPOSED TO DO. The other L2s are behind and they won't catch up ever in my opinion. Once JAM hits DOT will be AT LEAST 5 to 10 years ahead of all the major L2s and L1s. It's not even comparable to be honest. People are blind to not see it. Sooner or later people will wake up and realize "OMG, I've been a degenerate memecoin gambler while I could buy the Vishnu of the blockchain".
Simply put, this project does what others promise and don't deliver. DOT has already DELIVERED and is DELIVERING even more amazing things that no other chain has and if they do they don't package it like DOT does. Sure ICP has continous compute, but does it have native interoperability and can host L2s and smart contracts and has 500ms block times and is decentralized and has shared security to his L2s and has the best governance system in crypto and has over a few million TPS and has ... and has ... Bro, it's fucking impossible to beat DOT on technical superiority. Some day people will realize that they can't build a new use case on the other chains. That they're LIMITING THEMSELVES by staying on shit like ARB or POL or some other fucking shit like that. A few months back Polkadot Asset Hub launched and people can simply copy paste EVM code to DOT and it'll work. We're currently waiting for this referendum (https://polkadot.polkassembly.io/referenda/1864) to pass in order for Uniswap and Safe to launch on Asset Hub. Other major projects will probably follow. Should pass any day now. Slow and steady wins the race

62081930
>>62079750
>>62080914
>>62080937
>>62080949

Why should we believe some one from India

62082053
>>62081930
Truth is not to be believed. Truth is to be seen. Just try the chain out. And look at the data. I've provided you with plenty of evidence. You SHOULD NOT believe me. The essence of crypto is what? DYOR. Do Your Own Research. We really did forget our roots, didn't we?

Best regard from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar

62082374
>>62081930
I actually applaud you to be honest. Anon, I'm proud of you. Thank you for having CRITICAL thinking. We need more people like you. And again DYOR and you WILL come to similar if not EXACTLY THE SAME conclusions. I dare you, I double dare you, I triple dare you.

Best regard from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar

62084668
100$ end of bull run

Best regard from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar

62085029
75.
y2029

62085250
>>62026429
imagine being really hard to develop on, because your system uses a particularly confusing superset of rust, and then scrambling to make an EVM to attract more developers. no sympathy for rust faggots.

62086293
>>62085250
>because your system uses a particularly confusing superset of rust
Help me understand what you mean by
>a particularly confusing superset of rust
Rust is a programming language, sure. And how would one use a particular subset of it? Like what exactly do you mean by that?

62086622
>>62085250
Even if you just google "Does polkadot use a subset of rust or rust?"
It'll say "
Polkadot uses Rust—specifically, modern, full-featured Rust—rather than a restricted subset of the language.
Polkadot is built on the Substrate framework, which is designed from the ground up in Rust to ensure memory safety and high performance, critical for blockchain infrastructure.
"
So, I have no clue where you're getting your information from. The thing is I'm a programmer and what you said seems so akward. You're basically trying to imply that you can take just a subset of the functionality of Rust. A "confusing" subset of a programming language. Like what? You only take the else statement without the if? Can you elaborate? I guess you probably can't because either you're spreading FUD or you've been manipulated into something that isn't real.

62087253
>>61932834
Not even Larp Davis shills this gay little coin anymore.

62087258
>>61948998
>We've got a true nazi over here.
See? Nobody cares.

62087587
>>62087253
>>62087258
So, what's your point exactly? Thank you for the bump

62087811
>>62087587
My point is, Lark Davis has forsaken you. It's ogre.

item.title: The US dollars was 70% of the world's reserve currency in 2016. — 99 replies — 69.9/hr
item.content:encoded:
The US dollars was 70% of the world's reserve currency in 2016.

Open thread • Replies: 99 • Updated: 2026-04-07 19:44 UTC

OP

The US dollars was 70% of the world's reserve currency in 2016. It's 39% now.

Early replies (first 3)

62074981
>>62074965
lol no, the financial bust part is the great depression, the revolution and wars is the period between the end of ww2 and 2008, debt and restructuring was 2008 onwards

62074987
Seems like a silly unfounded chart given that gold were the main reserves before the dollar.

62075007
>>62074981
>the revolution and wars is the period between the end of ww2 and 1971, debt and restructuring was 1971 to 2008(2020 maybe?), new world order from then on

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62081934
>>62074965
>39%
Where is this number coming from?

62082083
>>62081934
its pulled out of his ass
The OP is a chink living in canada working for a chinese proxy engaged in p2p propaganda

62082104
>US is reported to be fucked
>China is the most in-debt country in the world per GDP and at the same time also has the worst fertility rate
>Europe is fully bogged down by bureaucracy
>Russia might be the most fucked of them all

Where is the future then? Some thirdie countries? SEA?

62082114
>>62075897
>soft power
"One day daddy America will recognize what a good bottom bitch I am, and all my sacrifices will be worth it!"

62083254
>>62082104
Probably Africa. Angola, Kenya, Nigeria, Dijbouti and Ghana. Those can replace Europe as host for US airforce refueling stations, drone and nuclear warhead parking lot, serves the same geostrategic role as Europe currently does, just better

62083313
>>62082114
Europe never sacrificed anything. Between 1914 and 1945 various European (proto)socialist sects and European communist banker clans fucked each other sideways and opened a lane for the US to become a global hegemon, which gave the US a rational to secure global trade intervening two times.

Since 1945 the US invested in todays inflation adapted dollar value around 10T dollars into Europe (not counting private investments), it practically rebuilt Germany, the Benelux, France and Italy on its tab, kept investing into Europe, paid practically the entire bill for Europes security for 70 years on US Millenials, GenZ and GenAs credit line, multiple times had its soldiers die to clean up European decolonialisation messes and opened its market for European goods, mainly German and France exports, fucking its own domestic market. What was the ROI? European nations made deals from the 1950s on with US enemies and competition, closed its market to US goods, harassed US companies, went again down the socialist sect roads and told the US at every moment to suck it up and fuck itself, while at the same time holding its hand open for gibs.

And yes between 1948 and 1990 it made some geostrategic sense to keep paying the bill and sucking it up. Since 1992 it was irrational, since 1998 it became suicidal. Today the point is reached to cut Europa lose and send it back into the late 19th century — impoverished agrarian shitholes who have no relevant energy resources, no relevant other resources and nothing that is actually worth keeping arrogant socialist communists pissing in the US face.

In all honesty, if I were the Potus and congress, I would throw a nuke on London, Madrid, Paris and Berlin, just to make a point showing every future "Ally" that if you keep pissing off the sugar daddy, you get a nuke

62083989
>>62074965
>The US dollars was 70% of the world's reserve currency in 2016. It's 39% now.
Stablecoins fix this

62084400
>>62083989
No. Control over 85% of global oil reserves does that. Stable coins are just a failed attempt at forcing private actors by legislative action to buy sovereign bond ponzis and by that making their own business model even more questionable of a ponzi as it already is. Crapto has no yield, its a pure greater fool ponzi scheme

62084571
>>62074965
so glad the lowest iq mutts got together to torch their fourth world shithole just as the rest of the world leaves them behind for good
starting new wars won't save you, in fact it only accelerates the collapse

62084585
>>62084571
We don't intend to rock the boat, we intend to sink it.

62084617
>>62075553
What the other guys said but we got a good exchange rate for the most part until recently

62084640
>>62075131
If China wanted to rule the world, they would ally with their neighbors & win easily.
Instead they war their neighbors every chance they get.
Which is why theyll never be more than 2nd rate.

62084641
>>62075904
he wants russian resources.
Its smart but not realistic. Maybe after Putin dies things can change.

62084650
>>62075553
It creats demand for dollars around the world. That keeps the price of dollars higher than it otherwise would be since new supply of dollars can be sent to other countries in exchange for manufacturered goods. This means the US doesn't need to have a massive manufacturing base at home which means less pollution and in general high stress and health risk jobs. Instead the US economy can function by basically finding various mechanisms to just hand the US population money which they can spend and eventually the money finds its way abroad. This creates a large service economy where most people don't actually do any "real work" like making shit. Now their job is just a way to inject money into the domestic economy so that it can then be sent over seas and then those people can use that money to buy things like US bonds(both corporate and government), oil, US stocks and other things that are traded in dollars. Jobs end up being less stressful, you work fewer hours, and there's lots of room to climb up since career ladders are just social structures to hand out money rather than actually give you real responsibility. There's still plenty of real jobs of course, but an insane amount of US jobs are the kind where you just sit at a computer and read emails and then send another email to someone else and that person tells the floormanager of a factory to tell their immigrant labor that there's overtime this weekend.

So Americans enjoy a high standard of living even compared to other developed countries. People own cars, get cheap fuel, imported goods are cheap, there's options to save with high returns and so on. If the dollar stopped being the reserve currency all the dollars that's currently floating around in the world economy would have little use outside the US and they'd flow back into the domestic economy. The dollar loses most of its value and the standard of living of Americans drops since they're losing access to foreign goods.

62084652
>>62082104
What future?

62084837
>>62075652
This and also the US can use it's global financial control as a weapon, which is what's pissing other countries off right now and causing de-dollarisation. But having the world reserve currency can also cause the whole world economy to dip like with 2008;

62087251
>>62074965
The big question is what basket of currency should I hodl when I sell muh Bittycorns. Swiss Franc? UAE Dirham? NOT gbp or eur those commie basterds are so cooked lmao

62087273
>>62087251
If you are in the US, only dollar
if you are outside the US, 90% dollar 10% whatever hyperinflated peripheral paper the treasury of the central planning committee that declared it legal tender shits out on your territory with likely 0 energy resources, 0 relevant manufacturing
>b-but I am in Chinka
>the sweatshop of the world
you definitely don't want to keep any yuan
>w-what about shiny rocks
lmfao

62087292
>>62075699
lol think you mean the cause of my phat stack

62087386
>>62075026
He's still a midwit whose firm has been sheltering closeted faggots for decades.

62087393
>>62087386
>ad blog drivel
not better than the 20th century mongoloid that tried to play epistemic authority. In fact exactly the same
same noose for this kind of scammers
ignoring is not enough, death is too good

62087426
>>62074965
This graph is not applicable to the US since it found itself in a position of power almost by accident after WW2 and managed to scam the whole world by soft-defaulting on its USD debt and "temporarily" ending Bretton Woods. This has nothing to do with actual empires. What you are witnessing is the return to the mean of the longest-running Ponzi in history.

62087571
>>62087426
Entire point of Dallios argument is that all leading economies eventually borrow more than they can afford to pay and it plays out mostly the same every time. They start with sound money. Then they switch to fractional reseves and then absolute fiat as a temporary measures which ends up being permanent due to how effective they are in the short term. Paper wealth appears to grow, debts pile up, then they reach some new emergency and have no option left and then the system implodes. Lather, rinse, repeat.

62087661
>>62087571
No that is not his entire point. Dalio is trying to derive a historical pattern out of a sample of one that cannot be applied retrospectively. The USD fiat Ponzi is unprecedented and financial "geniuses" like him directly benefitted from it but will frame its implosion as some kind of cyclical inevitability to deflect from the inherent and talmudic depravity of the whole system.

62087679
>>62087661
True.
yet here you are posting JYT retardation.
Its time to kill your entire lot. No exceptions.

62087791
>>62087679
>homosexual ESL spergs out when his fellow queers are exposed

62087814
>>62074965
The people that make these charts are legitimately retarded. I could debunk all of this.

62087946
>>62082104
>Where is the future then?
Whoever has the most brainwashed and loyal army willing to commit unimaginable crimes against the human race once all the chips are down.

62087958
>>62074965
white people were 95% of the world's population 100 years ago and now theyre only 5% and its not because we started actually counting how many jeets sand niggers and niggers and spics there actually are?

62087968
>>62074965
the world printed a lot more money than we did

item.title: There are NO jobs left — 61 replies — 68.9/hr
item.content:encoded:
There are NO jobs left

Open thread • Replies: 61 • Updated: 2026-04-07 20:16 UTC

OP

> 8 in 10 jobs posted online are FAKE
> those 2 in 10 jobs that aren't fake are all looking for either a buddy, family member, internal, senior level, or a literal unicorn for their positions

It's truly the end times now, isn't it?

Early replies (first 3)

62084288
Now you see why war is necessary. That will create a ton of jobs that you can do.

62084296
>>62084281
There's plenty of jobs it just the wages won't go up. I quit my shitty QC job and got another one a week later.

62084378
>>62084281
yeah there literally arent.. all these companies keep firing tens of thousands of people and we barely create any jobs

even dog shit mcwage jobs are impossible to get. Before covid you put in 10 applications and got a 3 stage interview into offer. Now its all fucked up

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62085342
>>62085331

62085368
>>62085331
>>62085342
actually the gypsies went to the UK and Germany because we were treating them like dogs

now we are a white ethnostate and you are 56% white

62086034
>>62085317
Get hired.
Process them all completely wrong.
Call ICE on the ones that fail because of their screwed up paperwork.

62086103
>>62085368
You live in the third world bro. No one cares about Romania

62086190
>>62086103
t. Nigel Ngubu Hamzaoui from South Kensington

62086392
If you haven't applied at least 300 times, you need to shut up about there but being any jobs.

Grow up man. Turn off the video games, stop doing scrolling and do the work.

62086407
>>62086392
no

62086437
>>62084281
Took me almost 2 years to get a new job and I have extensive credentials in a serious tech specialty. It's grim.

62086453
>>62084427
It was that way around D.C. and Arlington even 15 years ago. You couldn't order food half the time because the bitch working drive thru would just laugh at you for speaking English.

62086454
>>62086437
just take a shower incel

62086643
>>62085050
based

62087110
>>62084288
prob true

62087172
>>62084281
>>62084288
>>62084622
get a TS/SCI security clearance (they don't fuck around with fake postings) and get paid $125K to sit in a mailroom nobody uses.

62087181
>>62086437
Crazy how at the same time, the most rabid normie will tell you it's easy and you just gotta apply and climb the corporate ladder. Oh and if you don't like being exploited like cattle? Don't worry, just quit and look for a better company/boss/team! You're still going to be treated like shit, except they'll be just nice enough so that they can antagonize you if you dare speak up.

62087197
>>62084281
>It's truly the end times now, isn't it?
yes.

62087207
>>62087172
>just let the government literally probe your asshole and be subject to random drug screenings, continuous surveillence and FBI(r) Background Checks(tm) continuously for a job worse than anything commercial.
if you're such a fucking loser, than ya, go for it. but having to report to the government just because you go to shitaly or some shit is fucking dumb, and again, they are watching you continuously with their Palantir bullshit spyware.

62087227
>>62087172
Bro I have secret clearance and it doesn’t do shit desu

62087240
>>62087227
grim.

62087281
>>62084281
Steps:
1) Get a job
2) Sell all your crypto and get a money market fund at 4% per year.
Poor people shouldn't buy crypto!!!!

62087291
>>62084281
>It's truly the end times now, isn't it?
So when people declared "the end times" for the past 10+ years, what were you doing?
There's no jobs, no houses, no white people, no fucking anything.

62087377
>>62084281
White harder.

62087528
>>62084281
Stop using sites like Indeed, they keep up closed positions to pump their application numbers. There will be less fake postings on the companies' websites.

62087560
>>62087227
is there any way to get one that doesn't involve getting it sponsored by a company? i want one and meet the baseline requirements but haven't gotten any job that would sponsor it yet

62087590
>>62084394
fucking lady won't answer the phone at my doctor's office I don't know if she's Asian or Latina I think she's a hybrid
Would/10 tho if I ever get in there and get her alone and don't hnnnnnggh

62087707
>>62087172
>get a TS/SCI security clearance
Well obviously do this if you can but if it was easy everyone would and the jobs wouldn't pay so much.

62087766
>>62087227
Going from secret to TS/SCI instantly moved me from $85k a year to $140k a year and that was literally 16 years ago. If I still had a TS/SCI I'd make $225k a year easily at an easy job where I'd take 2 hour gym lunch breaks every day and work out with literal Navy Seals like I used to.

62087805
cleared world was funny, so many people did literally nothing all day and got paid six figure salaries with top tier benefits. ur in a windowless office day with no phone so it kinda blows though

62087955
>>62087766
Yea but to get TS u need a justification and that means generally a managerial role or principal role

62088163
>>62087805
I don't know how these people mentally cope with their own existence. The idea of willingly going to work every day for years and contributing absolutely nothing is just insane to me. I used to be in that world too, even as an "executive level" (junior manager), and I couldn't bear it. So I quit and now I'm happily doing the job of 5 people.

I often dream of working on one of those big projects full of competent people like the Manhattan project, cracking Enigma, or anything in early NASA. I know I have the skills for it, but I don't think those projects exist any more. The world has become so enshittified that everyone's just trying to keep their head down and avoid attention.

62088237
>>62088163
I could never figure it out myself, there were sometimes weeks were there was nothing to do but everyone had to show up for 8 hours and pretend to be busy with stuff. Soul sucking... Only lasted a few years, tried both civ/con roles. Skills regressed heavily. Glad you found something meaningful. It would be amazing to work on a project like that, but yeah most people just want the paycheck and to keep their head down.

item.title: Safe investments — 23 replies — 38.9/hr
item.content:encoded:
Safe investments

Open thread • Replies: 23 • Updated: 2026-04-07 20:33 UTC

OP

What are safe investments? Historically, the answer has been US bonds. Now, is it China, Swiss and Australian bonds that are the safest?
Aside from bonds, what other investments can project money?
Hard mode: no precious metals.

Early replies (first 3)

62081276
>>62081251
people say index funds so i guess those

62081282
>>62081251
Car parts
Tobacco
Marketable skills
SOXL

62081295
>>62081251
>Aside from bonds, what other investments can project money?
Probably one of these bad boys.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62081611
deep otm calls on wolfspeed

62081698
>>62081251
>safe investments
Gold

62081700
>>62081251
50x leveraged private credit etf

62081704
>>62081251
Land.
Forests.
Most real estate (anything you can rent out).

62081888
Literally Israel. As long as the US exists to fund it that is.

62081963
Human trafficing

62083536
>>62081251
Fascinating question

62083544
>>62081704
Real estate loses value once property taxes, building depreciation and inflation are factored in

62084739
>>62083544
Wrong

62084775
>>62081251
Helium

62084848
>>62081251
urea
>>62084775
I used the last few balloons worth in stock, sorry bro we're all out

62084892
>>62081251
DIY skills, tools, and the quality products that you can make yourself.

62084894
>>62084848
>lives in clownworld
>isn't balls deep in helium
Ngmi

62085068
Farmland, wheat and livestock, a bunker, and rosaries, because you're gonna need to pray to God that the US doesn't decide to nullify every asset on earth before it dies.

62085104
>>62081251
Honey, maple syrup, alcohol, research chemicals, nitrogen fertilizer, propane, solar panels, wood chipper, sawmill, guns, skid steer, knee pads, lube

62085188
>>62083544
Thankfully you can depreciate real estate so you don't pay income tax from them

62085934
>>62085188
Even with that tax write off real estate still loses value with everything factored in

62088233
Are swiss bonds the next great white hope?

62088280
>>62081251
>safe investments
Invest in yourself

62088335
>>62081251
Euro as is.
Deflation is coming only way to survive is hold cash and buy in when others are out.

BTC is steady and battle-tested. Altcoins can go up more but are riskier.

62059768

62059809

62072829

62073188

62073628

62073641

62073652

62073673

62073687
>>62073641

62075889
>>62066497

62076395
>>62059007
quantum threats good luck

62076433
>>62059007
BTC or nothing, smart anons are staking and just waiting for the pump.

62076441
>>62067554
>>62071949
ignore the jeet shilling his staking btc scam. He shills it in every thread.
Are you guys really that stupid to not realize this? The jeet was shilling some privacy defi scam before, forgot the name. It's probably some LLM bot tbqh

62076475
BTC will hit $70000 before the end of today, buy now.

Trust me.

62076605
>>62076441

62076963
>>62072569

62078281
>>62076475

62078766
>>62066485

62078785

62079308

62079466

62079523
>>62066497

Both had huge volume and engagement spikes recently. If the market takes off the will skyrocket.

62080772
>>62079523

62081770
>>62079466

62081774

62084985

62087745

62087762

Nico WHORE!!!!!!
*spits*

item.title: So, now that assblaster was confirmed controlled opposition, and LINK holders have become "the Cuckolds of Crypto"... — 52 replies — 17.7/hr
item.content:encoded:
So, now that assblaster was confirmed controlled opposition, and LINK holders have become "the Cuckolds of Crypto"...

Open thread • Replies: 52 • Updated: 2026-04-07 18:12 UTC

OP

So, now that assblaster was confirmed controlled opposition, and LINK holders have become "the Cuckolds of Crypto"... shouldn't we have a look at what he told us *not* to buy?

He tried very hard to steer us away from one coin in particular back in 2018.

They wanted you out.

Early replies (first 3)

62077049
well he was right about raiblocks

62077089
>>62077049
Only in the sense that he was "right" about LINK. It's price did go up, yet it achieved nothing. Sergey met Trump and still nobody cares about smartcontracts. LINK had every chance to succeed but failed.

>Controlled opposition is a political or strategic tactic where a governing body, organization, or elite group secretly supports, infiltrates, or manages its own opposition to manipulate dissent, control narratives, and prevent real challenges to the status quo

A functional stateless currency would challenge the status quo, and now it's been "over 5 years under the radar".

Watch how long this thread stays up.

62077098
>>62077000
>>62077049
>>62077089
Bullish for XRP

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62078703
HOLY SHIT

By sheer chance I happened to be watching Sunny today, "The gang finds a dumpster baby", and recognised one of the frames Asslarper used (pic related).

In this episode, Dennis (AB's avatar) convinces an activist to CHAINLINK himself to a tree, then LITERALLY KEKS him.

Now do you believe me?

Inverse Assblaster; what did he tell you was useless?

Raiblocks and Ripple.

Time is running out.

62078711
BOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOM

62078735
He even admitted his intentions in one of his final posts.

This ARG goes DEEP.

62078857
>>62078703
everyone needs to see this

62078921
>>62078618
But didn't you originally intend to make money?
Or are you like a sportsball fan that pays the team regardless of outcome and don't share in the winnings?

62079599
>>62078703
cuckolds of crypto.

It was there the whole time.

62079836
>>62078703
There it is folks.

"Cuckolds of crypto" was planned all along.

If you're still holding LINK after seeing this... well, you deserve what's next.

62079965
>>62078735
Link was .30-.40 when he posted this.

62079978
>>62077648
You mean the schizo posts about the referenced world vs the whatever the fuck he called the “new world”

62080163
>>62077915
that's a lot of manufactured horseshit for
>be at the right place at the right time

62080436
>>62079836
pool's closed / thanks for keeping this a link board.

62080485
>>62077089
Thread's still up and likely will be for days because this is a dead board, the irony of you making fun of one group of shitcoin holders for invoking hidden lore/"its a sekret" terminology and doing the same thing in your thread, nobody fucking cares about xrp you boomer faggot.
BOOOOOOOOOOOOOM!

62080493
>12 pbtid
>about raiblocks
Hmmm

62080684
>>62080485
>this is a dead board
It's a dead site, dude. It was fucking swamped with non-whites years ago and they all just go to /b/, /v/ and /pol/ for their le epic psyops and bait threads. All the average intelligence white people that used to be on this website are gone. I dunno where they went. A lot to Twitter, I guess.

62080692
>>62080684
>twitter
Yeah I think so. I’m not smart but I am white and I can’t believe it but I spend a far more amount of time on x now than 4chins. I’ve been here every waking minute since 2011 and never thought this place could be so fucking boring and gay.

62080695
>>62080684
That's true, probably why adem feels so at home here.

62081569
>>62078703
Assblaster convinced /biz/ to CHAINLINK themselves to a SINGULAR TREE and then cuckolded them!

The cuckolds of crypto was planned out, years in advance.

62081749
>>62078703
>>62081569
This is educational

/biz/ got psyopped, no doubt about it

>A SINGULAR TREE
>TONIGHT, STRAP IN

Inverse Assblaster

62081755
>>62080485
thread's still up because I didn't use "the N word"

Any threads that explicitly state Raiblock's new name or ticker quickly get taken out.

Don't believe me?

It's all in the archives

https://warosu.org/biz/thread/59678970
https://warosu.org/biz/thread/59678347
https://warosu.org/biz/thread/59671138
https://warosu.org/biz/thread/59600393
https://warosu.org/biz/thread/59538201

62082372
>>62078703
It's game over for stinkies

62082722
>>62078703
BOOOOOOOOOOOM

cuckolds of crypto!

62082884
>>62078703
remember when hillary talking about pepe was a big deal

62083016
>>62080684
why exactly did this site die off so quickly

x is awful and they're always changing the algorithms
plebbit hasn't been useable for at least 6 years due to insane moderation
every traditional forum is dead

where the hell did everyone go

62083040
>>62083016
Crypto isn't exciting since 2017 ended

Why?

Because people forgot what we were doing here to begin with

People forgot about Raiblocks

Tonight, they will be reminded

62084453
>>62083016
Moot was a spineless coward and Hiroshimoot doesn't give two shits about anything so long as the ad money stays flowing, so White men left for Twitter, a website that actually has influence on things.

62084638
>>62084453
>muh tweets are makin' a difference
they're just as useless as 4chan posts

62085762
>>62084453
yeah that makes sense
just sucks because the format here is so much easier to read

62085897
fuck all stinkies hate em all think they suck\fuck all stinkies hate em all think they suck\fuck all stinkies hate em all think they suck

62087388
>>62078703
Cuckolds of crypto

62087403
hug all stinkies love em all think theyre great\hug all stinkies love em all think theyre great\hug all stinkies love em all think theyre great

item.title: *BLOCKS YOUR CHART* — 7 replies — 16.3/hr
item.content:encoded:
*BLOCKS YOUR CHART*

Open thread • Replies: 7 • Updated: 2026-04-07 20:43 UTC

OP

BBZZZZZZZZZZZZZZZZZZZZZZZZZZZZZZZ

Early replies (first 3)

62088213
Slay queen

62088227
>>62088213
You’ve posted this in three fucking threads now. Your abject rejection of common board courtesy leads me to guess you’re fucking Indian as fuck and should get the fuck off my /biz/

62088242
>>62088227
Calm down Shlomo

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62088255
>>62088242
>brown shitskin defending another brown shitskin calls me a kike

Maybe you two should have a swim in the Ganges to cool off?

62088279
>>62088227
don't make me post about 10% of americans being millionaires and if you weren't one in 2025 you are ngmi

62088339
>>62088227
Uh oh little migger is mad

62088361
>>62088184
top kekkels

item.title: Are you getting your nails and Botox done yearly? — 17 replies — 10.2/hr
item.content:encoded:
Are you getting your nails and Botox done yearly?

Open thread • Replies: 17 • Updated: 2026-04-07 19:29 UTC

OP

Are you getting your nails and Botox done yearly? Maybe if you did you wouldn't be a NEET still.

Early replies (first 3)

62084255
>>62084227
If your image is 100% necessary for your job, that shit is necessary.
Like a realtor always driving a new car.
If they don't, it sends a bad message.

62084271
>>62084255
this is wrong. whenever I see my realtor driving up with a big car the only message that comes to my mind is that his commission is very big and he is capable of scamming me. big red flag. I would unironically prefer if he would drive up on a bike.

62084298
>>62084271
agreed, my realtor better be living in a dumpster

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62084339
>>62084271
>>62084298
Yet normies do not trust people who aren’t promoting that image. My mom would rather use a realtor who looks successful than even consult her son/my brother because she thinks Dapper Dan will have better connections when in reality he was a yes man who listed it for a year way over value and then didn’t put “as is” on the contract so she had to spend 20k on her pool to sell it when her son has a massive CRE portfolio. If I was him I would be pissed but he laughed his ass off when he heard about it. They always fall for the bells and whistles

62084616
>>62084298
Kek yea and eating out of a trash can. Fuck realtors.

62084695
>>62084271
Anon, we are the 1% of weirdos that think that.
Normal Fags need to see new cars, otherwise they get suspicious.

62084744
>>62084227
>I spend $12,000 a year on Botox, hair, nails, and fitness. In Utah, they're necessary — especially in PR.
>Hilary Reiter Azzaretti,
a face made for anal.

62084778
>>62084255
>>62084271
If I saw any salesman driving uo in a high-end car, a beater, or a bicycle, I know they're a loser retard piece of shit bitch. The only acceptable mode of transportation would be a Toyota Corolla with custom wheels, or a Greyhound bus.

62084799
>>62084271
Boomers evaluate people based on how much money they have. More money = you are a better person and boomers are their primary clients nkt your broke millennial/zoomer ass

62084900
>>62084227
As an aging millennial male I am starting to wear sunscreen daily and use retinol cream. That’s about it

62084918
she spends $12k a year on beauty regimen at 40+ because she's sucking and fucking every man in her church, the pr job is just an excuse to get out of the house.
Mormons are FREAKY

62084929
my rich aunts do this and much more, something like 50k a year on shit like this. they are starting to look like the bogdanoffs

62085032
>>62084271
This

62085263
>>62084227
im 45 pounds overweight and balding and i wouldnt look twice at that used up whore who is clearly 15 years past her prime (i use this term very loosely.)

62087139
Just got a manicure and pedicure this weekend. Feels good man. I figure if these worthless roasties can justify spending money they don’t have on this shit, I can spend money I actually have on it

62087673
>>62084339
This is the sad part. Work in any office, have a shit-ton of skills you bring to the table. Doesn't matter, just being polite and working well with others doesn't cut it. You still have to play the LinkedIn sychophant game and those people will attack you for any sign of awkwardness, no matter how useless of a person they are.

62087865
>>62084227
I'm thinking about getting a teeth professional whitening at the dentist. And a massage. That's about it.

item.content:encoded:

Open thread • Replies: 7 • Updated: 2026-04-07 20:25 UTC

OP

I have just been informed we are being granted two weeks . Nothing will happen for two weeks. Pump it.

Early replies (first 3)

62088070
is this the final TACO?

62088083
>>62088008
JUST KILL THEM ALL ALREADY SO MY BAGS CAN MOON AND I CAN STOP WAGING

62088173
>>62088008
yeah kiikes are careing about ceasefire and wont backstab! yeah cool!

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62088196

62088210
Its just a request also why is a paki speaking like he's from Britain

62088238

62088264

item.title: >HE BOUGHT FUCKING OIL — 10 replies — 9.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
>HE BOUGHT FUCKING OIL

Open thread • Replies: 10 • Updated: 2026-04-07 20:02 UTC

OP

>HE BOUGHT FUCKING OIL

Early replies (first 3)

62087549
>>62087540
LUBRICANT?

62087618
Seems to be the most jewish asset on teh planet desu senpai. Physical barrels are going for $150 a barrel now, but the niggers in charge of the prices are only pricing it at $70 a barrel for the next few months??

So if you question it, people say the strait will be opened and everything will be fine, but at this point tons of petrochemical plants are getting blown up left and right. Its not even about the strait anymore....but for some reason the price doesn't really take off like it should.

62087841
>>62087540
BABY OIL DIDDY BLUD

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62087921
>>62087618
It could be the market pricing in covid style lockdowns to reduce consumption.

62087922
>>62087618
The trick is that there is no such thing as a free market and there never will be.

62087932
>>62087540
Better than dog coins

62087936
>>62087922
Sure, but if you're underpricing a real physical thing, you're going to have to start rationing it. Also you're probably going to see a black market form if the right measures aren't taken.

62087973
>>62087540
if you got in on it early in the fiasco then good for you. buying now? you must be nuts when the hormuz is barely a fraction of a percent of commerce. they'll have to make paper oil cheap again eventually.

62088130
>>62087540
I've owned oil for 6 years. Get on my fucking level.

62088140
>>62087540
Shut the fuck up you moron. It's going to $200 whether you like it or not.
